author: Tai Hartman
description: Classify past daily-note captures into linked atomic notes via the Anthropic API. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Tai Hartman
manifest.description: Classify past daily-note captures into linked atomic notes via the Anthropic API.
manifest.name: Atoms

name: Atoms

releases.author: taihartman
releases.description:
## Atoms 0.6.11

Since **0.6.6** (last GitHub Release):

### Update notes
- Refresh older linker atoms to current pipeline quality (stamp `atoms-quality`, same classify path as Process)
- Home strip: dismissible, batch-friendly, body stays sacred

### Classification quality
- Ban self-wikilinks / self-duplicate reasons; treat aliases & prior titles as self
- Drop placeholder/junk link reasons
- Safer JSON parse on classify; alias apostrophe parse fix
- Quality stamp generations through 5+

### Home / library
- Recents sort/time use atom `created`, not file mtime after Update

### Process / install
- Update notes fixtures can run without API key (CLI/QA)
- Vault lanes: agent dogfood on demo/test vault only; phone install = plugin files only
- PR `Closes #N` is agent-checked (no Actions gate)

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/atoms/`, or update via BRAT (`taihartman/obsidian-atoms`).

Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.11.4.

releases.author: taihartman
releases.description:
## Atoms 0.6.6

### Classification quality
- **Stronger link reasons:** weak boilerplate (“preference about X”) rewritten into substantive reasons.
- **Keepable ideas stay atoms:** product/app/build pitches rescued from task/noise when they match keepable patterns.
- **No empty media stubs:** media work titles only become links when a matching note already exists in the vault (tags still added).
- **Prompt + people path:** better title/reason guidance; optional exact `People` index link for workplace-shaped captures.

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/atoms/`, or update via BRAT (`taihartman/obsidian-atoms`).

Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.11.4.

releases.author: taihartman
releases.description:
## Atoms 0.6.5

### Fix
- **Left sidebar on enable:** Atoms home is pinned into the left sidebar (next to Files / Search / Tags) when the plugin loads — including first install on phone. No need to hunt for the ribbon first.

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/atoms/`, or update via BRAT (`taihartman/obsidian-atoms`).

Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.11.4.

releases.author: taihartman
releases.description:
## Atoms 0.6.2

Community plugin lint cleanup for a cleaner Community/BRAT install path.

### Changes
- Settings headings use Obsidian `Setting.setHeading()`
- Production builds no longer spam the console (`ATOMS_DEV_COMMANDS` gated)
- API hygiene: `instanceof TFile`, typed settings open (no `any`), `window.setTimeout`, safer denylist for config folders
- Command rename: **Open home** (`atoms:open-home`)

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into:
`<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/atoms/`

Or update via [BRAT](https://obsidian.md/plugins?id=obsidian42-brat) → `taihartman/obsidian-atoms`.

Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.11.4.

releases.author: taihartman
releases.description:
First public release candidate for the Obsidian Community directory.

### Install
- **Manual:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/atoms/`
- **BRAT:** add `taihartman/obsidian-atoms`

### Notes
- Author metadata and install docs prepared for Community listing
- Classify past daily-note captures into linked atoms via Anthropic (your API key)
- Existing atom files are never overwritten on title collision

Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.11.4 and core Daily Notes.
